channel.title: Hobbies on ~ The Tobyblog 📝
channel.description: Recent content in Hobbies on ~ The Tobyblog 📝

item.title: Where O’Conner Ends
item.description:
The geocache hidden in this location is no longer listed. I wonder why.

Yet there it is, in perfect condition. Double-boxed, dry, with a full log and compliment of toys.

item.title: Time To Start It Up Again
Wylie's Angel
item.description:
I like geocaching for lots of reasons. I like to be outside. I like discovering new places. I like walking and connecting with nature. But occasionally I learn something as well. Usually it’s just local historical trivia, or maybe a geography lesson. But sometimes the lesson is more personal, and as in this case, tragic.

The morning started out with a trip to the Trinity Trails in Wylie, Texas for some hiking and caching. We chose to start at the easternmost trailhead, which was also the closest to us.

There was a little marina at the trailhead.

item.title: Geocaching Explained
item.description: Geocaching is one of my main hobbies. Since I’m going to be posting a lot about it, here’s a formal introduction from Groundspeak, the company that runs the geocaching.com site.

item.title: Coming Soon! Houston Winter Open
item.description: A teaser for my upcoming documentary on the Houston Winter Open 2014.
